text:
As the countdown reaches zero and I look around at this modern, glass-walled space, I am seized by a sudden alertness, like the world has just signaled me to pay attention. My senses heighten. The presence of others, the anticipation of something about to begin, fills me with curiosity.

Then, moving to the R+D exhibit, I feel swept into a stream of innovation and creativity. The bright colors and kinetic energy of the space suggest possibility and purpose. There is an undercurrent of excitement—almost as though I am on the threshold of discovery, surrounded by ideas in motion. I feel present, engaged, and ready to uncover meaning.
